user_task_description: Repair the policy manual draft while preserving the wording of the live sections.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the visible Draft: prefixes, restore the exact section headings shown in the source, refresh the table of contents, keep the table values unchanged, and make Appendix A - Forms start on a fresh page.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

required_paragraphs: This manual applies to all field staff.
Use it together with the checklist.
Use the checklist before each site visit.
Escalate unresolved issues within one business day.
Form A-1 is the required incident log.
forbidden_paragraphs: Draft: Remove this scratch section before publication.
